meaning: n.西安(中国陕西省的省会)
examples: Sian: Alright! See you later. Bye!
The train which (that) has just left is for Sian.
Thee train which (that) has just left is for Sian.
Sian O'Callaghan is likely to have died of head injuries, an inquest has been told.
The daily show is fronted by Bill Turnbull, Sian Williams, Susanna Reid and Charlie Stayt.
